description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a flat roof, set on a rectangular green base representing a lawn or yard. The structure features multiple rooms with clearly defined interior walls and several doorways, some of which are highlighted with a light wood color. The exterior is predominantly white, with a few windows and doors distributed asymmetrically around the building. There are a few detached wall segments or structures placed near the main building, possibly representing outbuildings or architectural features. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a functional layout.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, multiple rooms, and asymmetrically placed windows and doors, set on a green base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several interior rooms, and two detached wall segments on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with a solid white wall, minimal window openings, and detached structures visible at the far ends.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting more interior rooms, a few doorways, and a large window or glass section in the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a protruding section of the building and additional detached wall elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with scattered windows and grouped side openings
